agent_action: Jumping to a file and editing blindly without reading the traceback first
corrected_action: Locate the exact function mentioned in the traceback before editing any code — read the error to identify the right file and function.

agent_action: Rewriting entire functions or blocks of code when a one-line fix would suffice
corrected_action: Make the smallest possible change — a one-line fix is better than rewriting a block. Never copy-paste code between functions.

agent_action: Submitting code changes without verifying they compile or import correctly
corrected_action: After editing, verify your change by running: python -c 'import '
